photosensitivity_warning:
MINDWAVE contains visuals such as flashing lights that may trigger epileptic seizures.
A small percentage of people may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to harsh visuals such as repeating patterns or flashing lights.
Viewer discretion is advised.
system.controls_disclaimer:
MINDWAVE makes use of your QWERTY Keyboard and Mouse.
Trackpads are not recommended, and gamepads are not supported.

options.key_ghosting_test_text:
Try holding down as many keys as you can. If certain key combinations aren't registering, your keyboard likely suffers from key ghosting.

If certain key combinations restrict you from holding down 4 keys simultaneously, you may want to enable Key Ghosting Compensation.

tooltip.mute_on_lose_focus: Mute the game's audio when the window loses focus.
tooltip.pause_on_lose_focus: Active gameplay will pause when the window loses focus.
tooltip.window_mouse_lock_toggle: Certain sections of the game will keep the mouse cursor confined to the window.
tooltip.key_ghosting_compensation:
Some keyboards can't hold down too many keys at once.
Enabling this option will minimize the amount of simultaneously held keys required by certain microgames.
tooltip.test_key_ghosting:
Some keyboards can't hold down too many keys at once.
Click this button to test your keyboard for key ghosting.

basics:
Welcome to the lobby!

Here, Pandora and Smalls can pass the time by chatting with their fellow contestants before the next round of the tournament begins.
To look around, move your mouse to the edges of the screen or use WASD/the arrow keys.
Use the spacebar to open the submenu.
You can click on Smalls to talk with him.
...and you can click on Pandora to skip the lobby and start the next round of the tournament.

The first round will begin shortly.

If you need to re-read anything, you can press Tab to pull up the log.
submenu_reminder:
The first round will begin shortly.

To skip straight to it, just click on Pandora in the submenu (spacebar).

If you need to reread anything, you can press Tab to pull up the log.

scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_38: Honestly,|p| maybe we should go back to talk with her some more...
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_41: Or we could talk to some new people.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_53: Roxy was on her phone and she seemed nice.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_67: Dom was on his phone and he was more than happy to approach us.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_76: And now we've got someone cool to plan a gig with.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_84: There are absolutely people here who'd be cool to talk with.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_87: I might've just been wrong about this one,|p| that's all.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_90: Nothing we can do but move on and talk to someone else.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_93: Oh yeah?|p| You wanna keep dragging me along to talk to people?
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_96: How do you plan on convincing me of that?|p| Are you gonna keep bribing me with easy bets?
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_99: Hmm,|p| well I do want my twenty dollars back...
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_102: Maybe I should embrace the gambler's fallacy.
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_105: Shall we go double or nothing on the next person we meet?
scripts.0_lobby_smalls_alex_B_107: Bro,|p| if we keep meeting people like Alex, you'd better hope you win this tournament.

scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_1:
This is actually starting now.|p|
Everything feels so quiet.
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_2: I guess the silence is nice.|p| My ears aren't being constantly bombarded by the crowd...
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_3: People are irritating,|p| but Smalls makes it all bearable.|p| Talking with him never feels like a chore.
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_4:
...I'm starting to worry about entering other people's minds.|p|
I dont even play MINDWAVE.
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_5: After this door opens,|p| there could be anyone behind it.|p| Some deranged lunatic for all I know.
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_6: I just need to stop overthinking this,|p| beat whoever's behind that door,|p| and meet up with Smalls again.
scripts.sequence_0_3_monologue_7: ...and even if I don't think I can do it...
